scenarios.title: LLM Fine-Tuning, Training, and Serving Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Transformers model usage, local generation, fine-tuning, serving CLIs, PEFT adapters, LlamaFactory/Axolotl/ms-swift training, vLLM/SGLang/LMDeploy serving, BentoML model services, and LLM deployment.
scenarios.role: Use and modify TRL, the Hugging Face Transformers Reinforcement Learning library for post-training, CLI workflows, data/reward utilities, scaling backends, experimental environments, and repo development.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `trl` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: cli and configs, core training, data and rewards, experimental and environments, repo development, and scaling and backends.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `trl` when the request names `trl`, centers on post-training, CLI workflows, data/reward utilities, scaling backends, experimental environments, and repo development, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in llm finetuning training serving workflows. Then route to CLI and configs, core training, data and rewards, or experimental and environments when those focused workflows match.
